case_title: DR. ANDREW CROMARTY VS. HIPCRICKET, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER DR. ANDREW CROMARTY'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED NO SUBSTANTIVE OPPOSITION FILED. COUNSEL PRESENTED A STIPULATION WITH AN ORDER AND JUDGMENT WHICH WAS SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976 (302)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CROMARTY, DR. ANDREW RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT HIPCRICKET, INC. $260,626.63 PRINCIPAL, $2,242.50 ATTORNEY FEES, $660.35 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $263,529.48, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

ATTY. CHRISTOPHER COOKE, TEL.NO. (650) 638-7370 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER DR. ANDREW CROMARTY'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is Granted, no substantive opposition filed. Counsel presented a stipulation with an order and judgment which was signed by the court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/MJM)
